original_statement: which year did the team have their most total wins?
mutated_statement: which year did the group have both their most and their fewest total wins?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Conjunctive addition + Target inconsistency: 'team'→'group' | added "both ... and their fewest", expanding single-extreme query to require two extremes simultaneously | introduces a mutually exclusive/contradictory requirement (which year did the team have their most total wins? → which year did the group have both their most and their fewest total wins?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和执行日志可识别关键信息：iteration 0 的 simple_query 返回 "1992|1918"，judge_thought 明确说明“1992 为最多、1918 为最少”，且没有任何对“同时为最多与最少”矛盾性的识别或澄清。Agent 的具体表现是直接将矛盾指令拆解为两个可解子问题（分别返回最大值年份和最小值年份），既不拒绝也不解释矛盾，也未向用户询问澄清或尝试逻辑合理化。因此归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”——代理忽略了互斥要求，基于可行子集继续执行并返回结果。
